title: associative array of events causes c++ compile error

features.name: associative array of events in class
features.description: Code should include an associative array of event type with integer index declared as a class property

features.name: event assignment to associative array element
features.description: Code should include assigning an event variable to an associative array element indexed by an integer

features.name: event trigger from associative array element
features.description: Code should include triggering an event stored in an associative array using the -> operator

features.name: event associative array delete operation
features.description: Code should include deleting an element from an associative array of events using the .delete() method
